title: Antibiotics for the treatment of invasive PVL-SA infection
body: "This rapid systematic review identified and summarised evidence of the effect of antibiotic treatment on morbidity and mortality in hospital inpatients with invasive PVL-SA infection.  This rapid systematic review searched for research published up to 28 February 2025. Ninety-five studies were included: 3 observational studies, 14 case series, and 78 case reports.  "
